discover.marketplacePluginsDescription: Browse available plugins from registered marketplaces.
discover.noMarketplaces: No marketplace sources added yet. Go to the Marketplaces tab to add one.
discover.noPlugins: No plugins available in this marketplace

installed.title: Installed Plugins
installed.description: Manage enabledPlugins in Claude Code settings.json.

marketplaces.title: Marketplace Sources
marketplaces.description: Add remote marketplace.json URLs. The Discover tab will automatically fetch their catalogs.
marketplaces.empty: No marketplace sources yet. Click the button below to add one.

publicMcp.title: Public MCP Integrations
publicMcp.description: Pick a service card first, then use one-click setup from the detail page.
publicMcp.hint: One-click setup writes the selected MCP into the current workspace when possible. If a service exposes Copy MCP config, you can also copy it first and then import it.

status.checking: Checking MCP config for the current project...
status.detected: {{server}} was detected in the current project.
status.notDetected: {{server}} was not detected in the current project yet.
status.verificationHint: This checks whether the current workspace .mcp.json is wired up, not a live remote handshake.
status.workspaceHint: Open a thread workspace first to verify project-level MCP setup.
status.workspaceMissing: No workspace is currently available for verification.

figma.name: Figma
figma.summary: Local Figma Desktop MCP for bringing files, nodes, and layout context into your coding workflow without a remote auth flow.
figma.detailDescription: One-click setup writes the local MCP endpoint into the current workspace. You just need to enable the Dev Mode MCP Server in Figma Desktop and keep it running.

steps.open: Open Figma Desktop and enable the MCP Server in Dev Mode settings
steps.copy: Click One-click setup to add figma-desktop to the current workspace .mcp.json
steps.paste: Keep Figma Desktop running, then share a file, page, or node link in chat to pull design context

pencil.name: Pencil
pencil.summary: Design-to-code MCP integration for turning UI ideas into runnable code faster.
pencil.detailDescription: Click one-click setup to copy the template, then complete the final paste step.

steps.copy: Click Copy MCP config (or use the template below)

toast.clipboardMcpInvalid: No valid MCP config found in clipboard. Please click Copy MCP config first.
